title: Ralph Lauren Quilted Shoulder Knit Sweater-size M
description:
Vintage Ralph Lauren knit sweater featuring quilted suede shoulder patches in a timeless equestrian-inspired design. Made from soft ribbed cotton fabric, this sweater offers a comfortable fit and elegant casual style. The authentic vintage condition adds unique character, making it a perfect piece for classic wardrobe lovers.
Size M

title: Nightway Navy Blue Lace and Ruffle Cocktail Dress – Size 8
description:
Elegant Nightway cocktail dress in navy blue, featuring a fitted lace bodice embellished with subtle sequins and a halter neckline with back tie detail. The voluminous ruffled skirt adds a dramatic and feminine touch, perfect for evening events or special occasions. Its vintage pre-owned condition gives it unique charm and authenticity.
Specifications:
	•	Brand: Nightway
	•	Model: Lace & Ruffle Cocktail Dress
	•	Size: 8 (US)
	•	Color: Navy Blue
	•	Material: Polyester with lace and sequin detailing
	•	Condition: Used / Vintage – in good condition

title: Zakázka Metallic Knit Brown Dress – Size S
description:
Vintage Zakázka long-sleeve knit dress featuring a shimmering metallic thread upper in olive and black tones, paired with a soft brown skirt. Designed with a high neckline, elastic waist for a flattering silhouette. The piece offers a sophisticated vintage look with unique texture and charm, perfect for elegant casual wear or evening occasions.

Specifications:
	•	Brand: Zakázka
	•	Model: Metallic Knit Dress
	•	Size: S (Small)
	•	Color: Olive Green / Brown
	•	Material: Metallic Knit & Fabric Blend

title: Vintage Brown Leather Handbag
description: Elegant vintage brown leather handbag crafted from genuine leather, featuring a structured design with a front flap pocket and a distinctive bow-shaped buckle detail. The rich patina and natural creases highlight its authentic vintage character. Designed with sturdy rolled handles and fine stitching, this piece combines timeless sophistication with the charm of a well-preserved leather finish

title: Guess Black Faux Fur Hooded Parka – Fits Sizes S/M
description: Stylish Guess winter parka in black, featuring a detachable faux fur hood and a distinctive branded inner lining with “Guess Los Angeles” lettering. Designed with a front zipper and snap button closure, multiple flap and zip pockets, and ribbed cuffs for added warmth and comfort. This vintage parka offers both practicality and timeless urban style, with light signs of wear that highlight its authentic character.

title: The North Face Navy USA Graphic Hoodie – Size M
description: Vintage The North Face navy hoodie with bold USA print on the sleeve and graphic design on the back. Made from soft fleece cotton blend, featuring a relaxed fit, drawstring hood, and kangaroo pocket. A comfortable streetwear piece with authentic vintage character.

title: Peuterey Red Belted Jacket with Faux Fur Collar – Size 48
description: Vintage Peuterey jacket in deep red, featuring a soft faux fur collar and a belted waist for a structured fit. Designed with multiple front pockets, buckle details, and a zip-and-button closure. A stylish and warm outerwear piece with natural signs of wear that emphasize its authentic vintage character.

title: Vintage Black Leather Coat with Faux Fur and Animal Print Hood – Size M
description: Elegant vintage leather coat in black, featuring a detachable faux fur-trimmed hood with leopard-print lining. Designed with large front pockets, button closure, and wide cuffs. The supple leather and vintage finish highlight its authentic charm — a sophisticated and timeless piece perfect for colder days.

title: Nike NBA Pacers Gray T-Shirt – Size S
description: Vintage Nike “The Nike Tee” in heather gray, featuring the bold Pacers logo and iconic Nike swoosh in navy blue. Made from soft cotton blend fabric for everyday comfort. A classic sportswear piece with an authentic vintage touch.

title: Vintage Lacoste navy blue V-neck t-shirt in size L.
description: Crafted from 100% cotton, featuring the iconic green crocodile logo on the chest. Soft and comfortable with natural signs of wear that add to its authentic vintage character.

title: Vintage Guess black graphic t-shirt in size S.
description:
Vintage Guess black graphic t-shirt in size S.
Features bold red and white textured lettering with “Finest Denim – 1981 L.A. California” design on the front. Soft cotton fabric with natural signs of wear, adding authentic vintage charm.

title: Vintage Nike x NBA Houston Rockets t-shirt in size S.
description:
Vintage Nike x NBA Houston Rockets t-shirt in size S.
Classic red tee featuring the bold Rockets logo in black and white on the front. Made from soft cotton fabric, offering comfort and style with natural signs of wear that highlight its authentic vintage appeal.

title: Vintage U.S. Polo Assn. t-shirt in size XL.
description:
Vintage U.S. Polo Assn. t-shirt in size XL.
Navy blue cotton tee featuring a distressed American flag print on the front. Soft, comfortable fabric with natural wear that gives it an authentic vintage look and casual charm.
